# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.31.6 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~115k production LoC across 177 files; ~21k test LoC across 30 suites (includes `tests/SmpFoundationsSuite.lean` from WS-SM SM0.S — 50+ surface anchors + 41 runtime assertions); 3,355 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 395 host unit tests (was 327 pre-SM1.D; +68 from cmdline.rs parser/walker + bring_up_secondaries_with_limit + Phase 5 helpers) + 94 ABI conformance tests.
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.
- **Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.32.x → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3; **SM1.A (PSCI completion)** at v0.31.3; **SM1.B (Per-CPU data + TPIDR_EL1, closes SMP-M4)** at v0.31.4; **SM1.C (Secondary-core full init, closes SMP-C2)** at v0.31.5; **SM1.D (DTB cmdline + Phase 5)** at v0.31.6 — rust_boot_main now parses /chosen/bootargs and brings up secondaries based on CmdlineConfig (default smp_enabled=true smp_max_cores=4 per maintainer decision #7); 68 new HAL tests cover the cmdline.rs parser + DTB walker + bring_up_secondaries_with_limit + Phase 5 helpers. Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM0 sub-plan: [`SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases: SM1.E (IS-variant TLBI) → SM1.F (SGI primitive) → SM1.G (Per-core UART) → SM1.H (QEMU SMP integration test) → SM2..SM9 closure cut at v1.0.0.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
- **Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).

Specification documents:

- **seLe4n project spec:** [`docs/spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md`](../spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md) -- normative scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria.
- **seL4 microkernel reference:** [`docs/spec/SEL4_SPEC.md`](../spec/SEL4_SPEC.md) -- detailed summary of the original seL4 kernel semantics.
